title: roasted egyptian potatoes gratin
description: roasted new potatoes with a crispy, cheesy gratin and succulent lamb kofta
instructions: in a large bowl, toss the sliced potatoes with 2 tablespoons of butter, cumin, coriander, and paprika until they are evenly coated.
transfer the potatoes to a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes, flipping them halfway through.
while the potatoes are roasting, cook the lamb kofta in a large skillet over medium-high heat until browned and cooked through.
add the garlic and onion to the skillet and cook until softened, stirring constantly.
in a separate bowl, combine the flour, parmesan, and feta until well mixed.
remove the potatoes from the oven and top with the lamb kofta mixture, then sprinkle with the flour mixture.
transfer the baking sheet to the oven and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley or scallions if desired.
